title: bidens flagellaris
intro: Bidens flagellaris, also known as cagtail or cagtail bidens, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to eastern North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Bidens flagellaris are said to include wound healing, reduction of fever, and relief from various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery. Herbal preparations of Bidens flagellaris can be found in various forms, including tinctures, teas, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
